infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Bhapi Social needs camera access to take photos for posts and your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Bhapi Social needs photo library access to share images in posts and set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Bhapi Social needs permission to save images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Bhapi Social needs microphone access for voice messages.
